priorities.check_method: Standard-tier Council ran clean end-to-end: (1) Codebase recon read 13 prior-art source files (world.ts, sparkLifecycle.ts, godlyRecipes/types.ts, cutsceneOverlay.ts, debugOverlay.ts, main.ts, types.ts, effects.ts, godlyReducer.test.ts pattern, sparkLifecycle.test.ts pattern, voltkin.ts, effectsRenderer.ts, godlyCooldown.ts, save.ts CHECK Δ context). (2) Standard-tier batch PDR drafted: 8-field template, P0 + P1, explicit 9-item out-of-scope list to prevent scope creep, 11 acceptance criteria, 9 risks + mitigations, 8 tests (planned), bundle delta target +8 KB. (3) User approval received via explicit 'session batch approved!' message. (4) Council R1 parallel: Grok grok-4.20-0309-reasoning + Gemini gemini-2.5-pro with STRICT DECISION/RATIONALE/ALTERNATIVES-REJECTED/RISK/SKETCH template per challenge. 8 challenges including 3+ explicit + tool challenge (vi.useFakeTimers) + quality challenge (non-obvious failure mode). (5) Battle Ledger: 5 disagreements + 5 gaps. KEPT creatureLifecycle.ts naming (Gemini's godlyReducer.ts precedent was hallucinated; sparkLifecycle.ts is real precedent). ACCEPTED full 4-state CreatureState union (Grok+Gemini 2/3 majority over Claude's 2-state subset). ACCEPTED auto-delete in TICK reducer (Gemini cohesion + Claude 2/3 majority over Grok's explicit-DESPAWN preference). ADDED explicit has-guard in all 3 reducers (both R1s agreed). CONFIRMED handoff timer ownership (overlay schedules, main.ts dispatches — what Claude proposed; Grok misread). (6) PRIME-AUDIT 8 deltas applied: Δ1 host-gate SPAWN_CREATURE dispatch (CRITICAL — would have shipped 1v1 zombie-creature bug; both R1s surfaced from different angles), Δ2 full union, Δ3 has-guards, Δ4 save.ts world.creatures.clear, Δ5 bundle measurement methodology (npm run build verified +3.28 KB then +3.30 KB), Δ6 wall-clock-state-mutation documented S28 carry-forward, Δ7 vi.useFakeTimers test approach (kept test gated DOM-env-skip), Δ8 confirmed naming. (7) Implementation: 3 new files (creature.ts type+factory, creatureLifecycle.ts 3 reducers, creatureRenderer.ts Pixi sprite) + 2 new test files (creatureLifecycle.test.ts 15 tests, cutsceneOverlay.test.ts 3 tests gated skipIf no DOM env) + 6 edits (types.ts, world.ts, save.ts, cutsceneOverlay.ts, debugOverlay.ts, main.ts). (8) Gates: typecheck clean, vitest 447 passing + 3 gated-skipped, build 458.30 KB (+3.30 KB vs 455 baseline; well under +8 KB ceiling). (9) CHECK Triumvirate (RALPH + GROK-ANALYST + GEMINI-AUDITOR): 3 fixes applied — (a) save.ts also resets nextCreatureId on snapshot apply (Grok CH3 defense-in-depth); (b) cutsceneOverlay.abort() docstring clarifies CRITICAL GODLY_ABORT contract (Grok CH3 + Gemini CH4 timer-race verified safe in current main.ts connection-lost path); (c) added cutsceneOverlay.test.ts AC7 handoff-timer tests gated on DOM env. Rejected CHECK concerns with rationale: Grok CH4 TICK fan-out timing follows TICK_ENERGY precedent; Grok CH7 bundle delta math checks out; Grok CH6 Pixi cached-shared-texture is correct pattern; Gemini CH6 readonly drift matches existing Spark+Primitive pattern. (10) Browser boot smoke at preview port 15842/?debug=1: page loads cleanly, world.creatures Map initialized, world.nextCreatureId=0, debug panel DOM mounted, no console errors. Full SQ4-TR4 trigger smoke (AC11) deferred to user manual playthrough. (11) Committed d191bf0, pushed origin/master 3fa1741..d191bf0. ZERO behavior change to Phase 1 cinematic; additive entity infrastructure only. Real-context tokens at close: 300349 / 1000000 (30.03% GREEN).
